name: Baked Sweet Potatoes with Onions and Lime Butter (My Garden
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the butter. Squeeze in the juice of one lime and grate the zest from the rind.
2. Mix well until combined. Add salt and pepper to taste.
3. Slice the sweet potatoes without breaking through the base of each potato.
4. Place the onions and pieces of butter between each potato slice.
5. Wrap the potatoes tightly in foil.
6. Place the wrapped potatoes on a grill set over medium to low heat.
7. Cook for about 15 minutes, turning off the heat when done.
8. Serve.
